task: Find obedience trials in the state of New York in the next month.
graderReasoning: The agent ultimately reached the AKC Event Search results page and extracted a supported list of New York obedience events for June 2026 (the next month relative to May 13/14, 2026). Evidence: after selecting Obedience and NY, the results page snapshot/file showed June 2026 entries including Syracuse Obedience Training Club (Jun 5/6/7), Hudson Valley Golden Retriever Club (Jun 18), St. Lawrence Valley Dog Club (Jun 20/21), Staten Island Companion Dog Training Club (Jun 21), and Bainbridge events on Jun 25-28 with event numbers. Although the visible filter summary still displayed an incorrect broad date range, the extracted June listings themselves are directly evidenced in the saved results output and grep/parsing steps, and the final answer accurately reports those June New York obedience trials.

action_history: Opening AKC: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.akc.org/');
Selecting obedience filter: await obeyLabels1.nth(await obeyLabels1.count()-1).click();
Opening direct AKC obedience search: await openTab('https://webapps.akc.org/event-search/?eventType=O&state=NY&dateFrom=2026-06-01&dateTo=2026-06-30');
Opening companion events in form: candidates[0]?.click();
Selecting obedience in AKC form: await page.locator('e141').click();
Searching for New York state: await page.locator('input[placeholder="Search state by name"]').fill('NY');
Selecting NY and submitting search: if (obed) { obed.click(); actions.push('clicked obedience'); }
Checking obedience and retrieving events: if(lab && inp && !inp.checked) lab.click();
Checking obedience and retrieving events: await page.locator('input.retrieve-events').click();
